easy.title: URL Shortener
easy.description: Design a service like bit.ly that takes a long URL and generates a unique, shortened URL that redirects to the original URL.
easy.constraints: Focus on API design, base62 encoding vs hashing, database schema, and high read vs write ratio.

easy.title: Pastebin Service
easy.description: Design a service where users can paste blocks of text and share them via a unique URL.
easy.constraints: Focus on storage, data expiration, caching, and database choices.

easy.title: Rate Limiter
easy.description: Design an API Rate Limiter to throttle excessive requests from users and prevent abuse.
easy.constraints: Focus on algorithms (Token Bucket, Leaky Bucket), distributed caching (Redis), and latency.

medium.title: Twitter / News Feed
medium.description: Design a system like Twitter where users can post tweets, follow other users, and view a personalized chronological news feed.
medium.constraints: Focus on fan-out on write vs fan-out on read, caching strategies for celebrity accounts, and high concurrency.

medium.title: Key-Value Store
medium.description: Design a highly available distributed key-value store like Redis or DynamoDB.
medium.constraints: Focus on data partitioning, replication, CAP theorem tradeoffs, and consistent hashing.

medium.title: Chat Application
medium.description: Design a real-time chat application like WhatsApp or Discord.
medium.constraints: Focus on WebSockets, connection management, message ordering, and presence services.

medium.title: Ticketmaster
medium.description: Design a ticketing system for highly popular events that sell out in seconds.
medium.constraints: Focus on handling massive concurrent writes, inventory locks, and database transactions.

hard.title: Ride-Sharing Platform
hard.description: Design a ride-sharing service like Uber or Lyft that matches drivers with riders.
hard.constraints: Focus on geospatial indexing (QuadTrees/Geohash), real-time location tracking, distributed transactions, and high availability.

hard.title: Video Streaming Service
hard.description: Design a video streaming platform like YouTube or Netflix.
hard.constraints: Focus on video encoding pipelines, CDN architecture, chunking, and handling highly skewed access patterns.

hard.title: Distributed Message Queue
hard.description: Design a distributed message queue system like Apache Kafka.
hard.constraints: Focus on sequential disk I/O, partition leadership, consumer groups, and exactly-once vs at-least-once semantics.

hard.title: Google Drive / Dropbox
hard.description: Design a cloud file storage and synchronization service.
hard.constraints: Focus on block-level deduplication, chunking large files, metadata consistency, and efficient syncing.
